# GEO Tracker

> AI mention analytics for brands. Track where and how your brand appears across AI search engines like Gemini, Perplexity, and ChatGPT.

## What it does

- Monitors brand mentions across AI engines (Gemini, Perplexity, OpenAI)
- Tracks share of voice over time
- Detects competitor mentions
- Scores sentiment of brand mentions
- Alerts when brand is missing from AI responses it should appear in

## Who it's for

- Marketing teams who want to know if their brand appears in AI search results
- Founders tracking brand visibility in AI-powered search
- SEO professionals expanding into Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

## Key concepts

- Share of Voice (SoV): percentage of AI responses that mention your brand
- Citation tracking: which websites AI engines cite when answering queries in your category
- Competitor displacement: when a competitor is mentioned instead of you

## Product

- URL: https://geo.blinkerhub.com
- Pricing: Free tier (3 keywords, manual scan) · Pro UGX 90,000/mo (20 keywords, daily auto-scan)
- Built by: Blinkerhub (blinkerhub.com)

## API / Integrations

- MCP server available for Claude integration
- Webhook support for scan completion alerts (Pro tier)

## Contact

- Web: https://blinkerhub.com
